summary: The diff modifies backend/main.mo to implement cancel-all-open-orders logic before repositioning the grid each cycle, as required by REQ-17. The trading loop structure and the dynamic quantity formula (quantity = 10 / midPrice) are preserved. The truncated portion of the file prevents full verification of the implementation details, but the visible code shows the correct architecture (ICDexWithOpenOrders type with getOpenOrders, cancelOrder, and the cancel-all comment before placing orders). No frontend files were modified. project_state.json is updated to reflect the new version.
